elements.name: Claude Code
elements.responsibility: Reads the hook manifest at plugin load and execs the registered scripts on lifecycle events; consumes their stdout JSON to inject context.
elements.subtitle: agent harness

elements.name: engram CLI binary
elements.responsibility: Go binary built and refreshed by session-start.sh. Refined in c3-engram-cli-binary.md.
elements.subtitle: Go binary built by session-start.sh

elements.name: hooks.json
elements.responsibility: Manifest mapping SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit, and PostToolUse events to their scripts via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} paths and per-event timeouts (10s / 5s / 5s).
elements.subtitle: manifest

elements.name: session-start.sh
elements.responsibility: Synchronously emits the memory-skill announcement. Asynchronously rebuilds the Go binary when any *.go is newer than the cached binary mtime, deleting the prior binary first to avoid macOS provenance SIGKILL, then symlinks ~/.local/bin/engram to it.
elements.subtitle: skill announcement + async rebuild

elements.name: user-prompt-submit.sh
elements.responsibility: Emits additionalContext reminding the agent of /learn and /prepare boundaries on every user prompt.
elements.subtitle: /prepare /learn nudge

elements.name: post-tool-use.sh
elements.responsibility: Emits the same /learn / /prepare reminder after each tool use.
elements.subtitle: /prepare /learn nudge

focus.name: Hooks
focus.responsibility: Three bash scripts wired by hooks/hooks.json; emit JSON additionalContext, async-rebuild the binary on SessionStart.

name: hooks
preamble: Refines L2's E8 Hooks container into the manifest plus three bash scripts wired to Claude Code lifecycle events. Hooks emit hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext JSON on stdout to inject reminders into the agent's context. The SessionStart hook additionally rebuilds the Go binary asynchronously when any source file is newer than the cached binary, isolating the build from the agent's own Bash provenance so macOS doesn't SIGKILL it on exec.

relationships.description: fires lifecycle events as subprocess execs with JSON stdin
emits SessionStart additionalContext announcing memory skills
async go build to ~/.claude/engram/bin/engram when any *.go is newer than the cached binary
